stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP698 figure 4.7.
Given the following conditions, at what values is the Maximum Take-Off Mass (MTOM) limited by VMBE?

Airfield elevation: 111 ft
Slope: 0.5% upslope
QNH: 1013 hPa
OAT: 41°C
V1: 149 kt
Headwind: 10 kt

options.b: V<sub>MBE</sub> can NOT be lower than V<sub>1 </sub>thus a take-off can NOT be commenced in these conditions.
options.d: The same as the maximum structural take-off mass of 62 800 kg.
